title: [WIP] Depth-recurrent QAT: 3x4 loops, 768d, 15.6MB artifact
author: hacksurvivor

data.description: 3 shared transformer blocks looped 4x to create 12 effective layers from 3 stored blocks.
Uses grouped-query attention with fewer KV heads than attention heads.
Uses fp16 tied embedding export for the embedding/output head.
Rank-4 LoRA adapters on Q/V projections for loop specialization across virtual layers.

novel_contributions: Depth recurrence with 3 shared blocks looped 4 times to increase effective depth under a parameter budget
Wider 768-dimensional model enabled by freed parameter budget
Per-loop rank-4 LoRA adapters on Q and V projections for specialization
Quantization-aware training with STE fake-quantization in CastedLinear to reduce post-quantization degradation
LAWA weight averaging during warmdown for quality improvement
fp16 tied embedding export to preserve output head quality
